page.title: AI Assistant
page.subtitle: Ask questions about your finances in natural language

chat.keyboardHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line

notConfigured.heading: AI Not Configured
notConfigured.message: No AI provider is configured. To use the AI Assistant, please {link} in your settings.

suggestedQueries.heading: Ask about your finances
suggestedQueries.description: I can answer questions about your spending, income, account balances, net worth, and more.
suggestedQueries.monthlySpendingQuery: How much did I spend last month?
suggestedQueries.topCategoriesQuery: What are my top 5 expense categories this year?
suggestedQueries.accountBalancesQuery: What are my current account balances?
suggestedQueries.compareMonthsQuery: Compare my spending this month vs last month
suggestedQueries.netWorthTrendQuery: Show my net worth trend for the last 12 months
suggestedQueries.savingsRateQuery: How much have I saved this year compared to my income?

confirmAction.name: Name
confirmAction.expired: This confirmation expired. Ask again to retry.
confirmAction.bulkRowSummary: {valid, plural, one {# transaction} other {# transactions}}{skipped, plural, =0 {} other { · # skipped}}
confirmAction.createdTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No transactions created} one {# transaction created} other {# transactions created}}
confirmAction.createdInvestmentTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No investment transactions created} one {# investment transaction created} other {# investment transactions created}}
confirmAction.rowsSkipped: {count, plural, one {# row skipped} other {# rows skipped}}
confirmAction.updatedTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No transactions updated} one {# transaction updated} other {# transactions updated}}
confirmAction.deletedTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No transactions deleted} one {# transaction deleted} other {# transactions deleted}}
confirmAction.updatedInvestmentTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No investment transactions updated} one {# investment transaction updated} other {# investment transactions updated}}
confirmAction.deletedInvestmentTransactions: {count, plural, =0 {No investment transactions deleted} one {# investment transaction deleted} other {# investment transactions deleted}}
confirmAction.createdTransfers: {count, plural, =0 {No transfers created} one {# transfer created} other {# transfers created}}
confirmAction.createdPayees: {count, plural, =0 {No payees created} one {# payee created} other {# payees created}}
confirmAction.updatedPayees: {count, plural, =0 {No payees updated} one {# payee updated} other {# payees updated}}
confirmAction.deletedPayees: {count, plural, =0 {No payees deleted} one {# payee deleted} other {# payees deleted}}
confirmAction.createdSecurities: {count, plural, =0 {No securities created} one {# security created} other {# securities created}}
confirmAction.updatedSecurities: {count, plural, =0 {No securities updated} one {# security updated} other {# securities updated}}
confirmAction.deletedSecurities: {count, plural, =0 {No securities deleted} one {# security deleted} other {# securities deleted}}

relay.helpIntro: Run your own MCP agent and it will answer prompts from this chat using your subscription.
relay.tokenStep: First, create a Personal Access Token in <link>User Settings -> API access</link>, then use it below.
relay.step2: Connect the agent to Monize using Claude CLI:
relay.allowToolsNote: Exit Claude and restart it with this switch so it auto-approves every Monize tool call:
relay.step3: Start an agent loop so Claude listens for queries from Monize:
relay.loopPrompt: Loop forever: call get_next_prompt; if hasPrompt is false, call it again; otherwise handle the request with the Monize tools and call post_response with the answer; then repeat.
relay.codexNote: Add this to ~/.codex/config.toml, set MONIZE_TOKEN to your token, then run codex and paste the prompt above.
